body:
🧪 *CLASS TEST NOTICE* 🧪

> *Date:* Tomorrow (Friday)  
> *Subject:* Chemistry 

Please be prepared for a written class test tomorrow during the chemistry period.

📋 *Likely Topics For Revision*  
- Basic and Acidic Salts  
- Formation of Salts
- Neutralisation Reaction 
- Chemical Formula of Salts  
- Basic and Acidic Radicals (Cations & Anions)  
- Nature of Salts (Acidic, Basic, Neutral)  
- The pH Scale and Values


```All the best with your preparation!```
